name: Arkansas Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Arkansas - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.streetAddress:
4815 West Markham Street, Slot 73
Little Rock, AR 72205
address.description:
Arkansas Dietetics Licensing Board
c/o Arkansas Department of Health
4815 W. Markham Street, Slot 24
Little Rock, AR 72205-3867

renewalCycle: Annual + 12 CE hours (*Renewal fee temporarily reduced to $3.00 for 2025-2026*)

requiredDocuments.name: Notarized Application
requiredDocuments.description: Application form with your notarized signature.

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Copy of your current, active CDR registration card (for full licensure).

requiredDocuments.name: Check or Money Order
requiredDocuments.description: Made payable to the Arkansas Dietetics Practice Fund.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does an Arkansas dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The standard initial license fee is $110. However, the Arkansas Dietetics Licensing Board has announced a temporary fee reduction down to $6.00 for the period from July 1, 2025, to June 30, 2026.

mainEntity.name: When does the Arkansas license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Arkansas dietitian license is renewed annually. The standard renewal fee is $50 (temporarily reduced to $3.00 for the 2025-2026 cycle).

mainEntity.name: What are the continuing education requirements for Arkansas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Arkansas requires 12 continuing education units (CEUs) annually to maintain state licensure. For your CDR registration, 75 CEUs are required every five years.

mainEntity.name: Does Arkansas have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Arkansas. To work in Arkansas, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Arkansas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Arkansas while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
